_about: Speed + memory micro-benchmark, Apple M4 Pro / 48 GB / macOS 15, one engine at a time, uncontended. cold_start_s = wall to first transcript from a cold process (model load + ANE compile). steady_rtfx = audio_s/wall with one-time load removed (mp-cli: 1-file vs 24-file differencing on LibriSpeech test-clean; cohere: median FluidAudio per-file rtfx dropping the cold file 0). peak_rss_mb = /usr/bin/time -l maximum resident set size of the isolated child (whole CLI: Swift runtime + loaded model). Reproduce with speed_bench.py.

engines.rss_note: 10.7-11.6 GB across 2/8/12-file runs; constant w.r.t. file count -> model-resident working set, not harness accumulation. Measured via the FluidAudio CLI (same SDK MacParakeet would integrate). Decision-critical: viable only on 16 GB+ Macs.
